title: Codex plugin manifest (.codex-plugin/plugin.json)
description: Synthesized from the upstream Codex plugin manifest specification (developers.openai.com/codex/plugins) and cross-checked against the RawPluginManifest Rust type at codex-rs/core-plugins/src/manifest.rs. The manifest spec is broader than what the local Rust parser deserializes — fields like author/homepage/repository/license/keywords are valid published-manifest fields consumed by the marketplace UI and publishing tools, not by the CLI's runtime parser.

description.description: Short description shown in marketplace UI.

skills.description: Relative path (./...) to a skills folder.

mcpServers.description: Relative path (./...) to an mcpServers configuration file (typically ./.mcp.json).

apps.description: Relative path (./...) to an apps manifest (typically ./.app.json).

interface.description: Install-surface metadata controlling how the plugin is presented.

displayName.description: Plugin title shown on install surfaces.

websiteUrl.description: Lowercase-Url alias accepted by the parser.

defaultPrompt.description: Starter prompts shown to users. Up to 3 items, each ≤128 chars (per MAX_DEFAULT_PROMPT_COUNT/MAX_DEFAULT_PROMPT_LEN in the upstream parser).

composerIcon.description: Relative path to a composer icon image (typically under ./assets/).

logo.description: Relative path to a logo image (typically under ./assets/).

screenshots.description: Relative paths to screenshot images (typically under ./assets/).
